data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN) Utilization
data.description: Adobe.com employs CDNs to efficiently deliver content on its site globally.
data.technical_spec: Cloud-based CDN services, multi-region edge servers

data.title: Scalable Microservices
data.description: Adobe leverages a microservices architecture to ensure scalable and independent application deployment.

data.title: Load Balancing Capabilities
data.description: The site utilizes load balancing to distribute traffic evenly across servers, enhancing performance under load.
data.technical_spec: Nginx or HAProxy with automatic failover

data.title: Responsive Web Design
data.description: Ensures that adobe.com is accessible and aesthetically pleasing across all device types and sizes.

data.title: APIs and Integration Points
data.description: Adobe offers public APIs for developers to integrate Adobe services into other applications and services.
